block_03: The time has come to take the hard work to the next level, claim your seat into the Final Battle that will show who's the №1 trader in Asia, and take your chances to claim a share of the $5000 cash prize. At this point, if you're here, it's all about survival, and those traders who come into the winning ranks of the 4th round will get a free ticket to the major league!
block_04: The 4th round begins in a few days, on July 20 — at this stage, you are now one step away from standing in the ranks of the top traders in Asia!
block_06: From June 29-August 2, 2020, we hold 4 free tournaments, each lasting a week. Each free tournament has up to 20 winners who will get a ticket to the Final Battle with the $5000 prize fund.
block_07: Will you win one of the lucky tickets?
